## Water Station Monitoring Website

This is a Next.js 14 application using Material UI for monitoring water stations with interactive charts and data export capabilities.

### Project Setup Completed:
- ✅ Created .github/copilot-instructions.md file
- ⏳ Scaffold Next.js project
- ⏳ Customize project structure  
- ⏳ Install dependencies
- ⏳ Create reusable components
- ⏳ Implement pages and routing
- ⏳ Test and launch project

### Tech Stack:
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Material UI (latest)
- Recharts for visualization
- TypeScript
- CSV export functionality

### Features:
- Station list page with status indicators
- Dynamic station details with filtering
- Interactive charts for multiple metrics
- Date range selection
- CSV export and Excel preview
- Responsive design
